untranslatable_reason: Diamond pattern recognition requires shape analysis (tall vs short, wide vs narrow proportions, aspect ratio calculation) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed price/volume indicators and comparison operators. Pattern geometry detection is not supported by the available indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted to approximate diamond breakout conditions: used Donchian channels to approximate breakout levels (upper for upside, lower for downside), and light volume condition using hvol_20. However, the core signal requirement—identifying the actual diamond consolidation pattern geometry (aspect ratio, height-to-width ratios, and shape characteristics)—cannot be translated. The 69% success rate for downward breakouts and 17% average decline inform a conservative 20-day hold and 5% stop loss. Throwback/pullback penalties are not directly expressible as conditions.
